---
title: "Kennedy Gitau"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your.email@example.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/gitaukennedy
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/kennedy-gitau-a242562b3
---

## Actuarial Data Scientist | Technical Risk Analyst

I am an Actuarial Analyst and Data Scientist specializing in the design, building, and deployment of end-to-end machine learning engines and interactive data applications. My expertise lies at the intersection of rigorous mathematical risk modeling, statistical learning, and robust backend engineering.

---

## Technical Expertise

* **Actuarial Science:** Mathematical risk modeling, insurance data analysis, and professional certification preparation (IFOA Papers CS1 & CM1 in progress).
* **Machine Learning & Engineering:** End-to-end deployment utilizing Python, FastAPI, Streamlit, and Scikit-learn.
* **Data Infrastructure:** Modern development utilizing T-SQL, Docker, Git, and cloud automation platforms.

---

## Contact Information

If you would like to discuss predictive modeling, actuarial risk analysis, or software engineering opportunities, feel free to reach out:

* **Email:** [gitaukennedy678@gmail.com](mailto:gitaukennedy678@gmail.com)
* **GitHub:** [github.com/gitaukennedy](https://github.com/gitaukennedy)
* **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/kennedy-gitau-a242562b3](https://linkedin.com/in/kennedy-gitau-a242562b3)
